files_new_note: Originally planned a new engine/rpc/edge_entity_test.go; actual implementation instead extended the existing fixture/test files (engine/rpc/server_test.go's TestPutEdgeAndEntityHandlers, engine/rpc/integration_test.go's new PutEdge_Compact_GraphNeighbors/PutEntity_LookupEntity_RoundTrip subtests) since both files' existing fixture helpers (newFixture/newIntegrationFixture) already needed direct edits for the NewServer signature change, making a separate test file an unnecessary split.
files_explicitly_not_touched: engine/rpc/server.go's PutSegment/GetFile/ReadPartial/GraphNeighbors/SearchCandidates handlers (read, not modified beyond adding new fields to Server struct/NewServer signature)
call_sites_needing_signature_update: engine/rpc/server_test.go:149 NewServer(cat, cs, idAlloc, g, store, rootNodeID)
engine/rpc/integration_test.go:197 rpc.NewServer(cat, cs, idAlloc, g, store, rootNodeID)
breaking_changes: NewServer gains two new trailing parameters (edgeLog *graph.EdgeLog, entityIndex *btree.Tree), both nil-valid -- matches existing btreeStore nil-valid convention. Both existing call sites (both in-repo tests) updated in this same commit.
risk_notes: Proto change is additive only (3 new RPCs, 2 new message pairs, service line updated) -- no existing field/RPC renumbered or removed, so existing generated stubs for the original 6 RPCs are binary/wire compatible.

Python stub regeneration confirmed to not affect agents/ingestion/wiring.py (that file uses PutSegment/SearchCandidates only, via the lazy-import GrpcPutSegmentClient/GrpcSearchCandidatesClient pattern) -- full agents/ pytest run confirms this post-regen.

entityIndex uses a brand-new, separate *btree.Tree/NodeStore/NodeAllocator triple in tests -- does not share the existing path-index tree fixture, avoiding any risk to already-verified SearchCandidates behavior.
